extension.description: Git operations (rebase, merge, pull, push, commit, reset, cherry-pick, history) via sidebar TreeView + QuickPick UI
view.name: Git QuickPick
config.commitFieldStyles: Brightness per commit field (bright/dim) in the History & Branches view. e.g. {"message":"bright","date":"dim"}
config.commitFieldWidths: Max width hint (px) per meta field (date/author/hash) in the History & Branches table. Columns shrink on narrow sidebars.
config.messageInputPosition: Where to place the commit message input in the History view: top or bottom.
config.workspaceInWebview: Move Changes and Stashes into the History webview (Changes on top, Stashes at the bottom) and hide the separate Workspace tree view, so one view uses the full width.
config.showInputWhenChecked: Show the commit message input and button only when at least one changed file is checked.
config.historyCount: Number of commits to load in History and per-branch history.
config.language: UI language. 'auto' follows the OS/VS Code locale. Reload the window to apply.
config.backupBeforeRebase: Create a recovery backup branch (backup/<branch>/<timestamp>) before 'Rebase onto'.
config.backupMaxKeep: When cleaning up backups, keep this many most-recent backups per branch (0 = no count limit).
config.backupMaxAgeDays: When cleaning up backups, delete backups older than this many days (0 = no age limit).
config.commitFieldOrder: Order of fields for each commit. Only the first field is bright (label); the rest are dimmed.
